name: Globe Life Inc. 4.25% Junior Subordinated Debentures due 2061
summary: Globe Life Inc. 4.25% Junior Subordinated Debentures due 2061 is a debt instrument issued by Globe Life Inc. These debentures pay a fixed interest rate of 4.25% and are scheduled to mature in 2061. Globe Life Inc. is a financial services holding company that specializes in life and supplemental health insurance products.
